      Create ICT Deposit

      Creates an ICT deposit

      The call builder

    • createIctDeposit

      public IctDepositsCreateIctDepositResponse createIctDeposit(String accountId, IctDepositCreate ictDepositCreate) throws Exception
      Create ICT Deposit

      Creates an ICT deposit

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      ictDepositCreate - An Instant Cash Transfer. Funds are moved from a configured Firm account to a customer's brokerage account.
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

      Exception - if the API call fails
